generated_oml:
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Electrical current sensor located at the motor input measuring I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentMQTT
]

instance JointAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder providing joint angle information on the motor side"
    DTDFVocab:producedData JointAngleMQTT
]

instance GearboxRelativeEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder capturing relative motion between gear stages"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleMQTT
]

instance MotorCurrentMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance JointAngleMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom JointAngleEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxRelativeEncoder
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped trace of the measured motor current streamed over MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance MeasuredAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped trace of the measured joint angle captured by the motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointAngleMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance RelativeAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped trace of the measured relative angle captured by the gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance ComputedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque trace derived from measured current and angle"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance ComputedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity trace derived from the relative angle data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance SimulatedMotorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output trace obtained from the Simulink motor model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance SimulatedGearboxData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox output trace obtained from the Simulink gearbox model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance SysMLMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML engineering model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance SysMLGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML engineering model of the gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the motor dynamics used for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance SimulinkGearWheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the gearwheel dynamics used for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the complete gearbox assembly"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance FrictionModel_CoulombViscous : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb‑Viscous white‑box joint‑friction model used in the twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance FrictionModel_Stribeck : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck joint‑friction model used in the twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance FrictionModel_Dahl : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl joint‑friction model used in the twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance FrictionModel_LuGre : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre joint‑friction model used in the twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalDataProcessing
]

instance PhysicalDataProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing component that orchestrates simulation, data‑calculation models, and MQTT data streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveDashboardService
]

instance InteractiveDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that provides an interactive dashboard visualizing real‑time measured vs. simulated data traces, performs continuous white‑box/black‑box friction model identification, and delivers real‑time diagnostics to improve robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight, MotorCommandUpdateAction, DeviationDiagnosticInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into current estimated friction parameters derived from ongoing identification"
]

instance DeviationDiagnosticInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnostic report on deviations between simulated and measured signals informing maintenance and controller tuning"
]

instance MotorCommandUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of motor current commands based on updated friction estimates"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "High‑frequency real‑time operation; sensor data streamed and processed continuously, with friction model identification performed on a continuous basis during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Consists of: physical data sources (sensors), MQTT data middleware, Asset Administration Shells exposing assets and metadata, a processing component housing simulation and calculation models, a data store containing all traces, and a visualization dashboard; all orchestrated to form the digital shadow workflow."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design – SysML structural/behavioral models; Simulation – executable Simulink models of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox; Data acquisition – real‑time MQTT data capture; Data linking – linking traces to models; Validation – continuous comparison of simulated and measured signals; Deployment – execution of the digital shadow with dashboard visualization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of every data point back to its source and calculation ensures model validity; continuous identification accounts for wear and tool changes; white‑box models rely on accurate motor constants and gear parameters; black‑box models avoid explicit parameter identification; real‑time comparison between simulation and measurement verifies fidelity; uncertainty from sensor noise and model approximations is acknowledged."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data is transmitted via MQTT to the digital shadow; AAS is used for model and data linkage; no explicit mention of Ethernet/IP or OPC UA."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses SysML, AAS, MBSE best practices, and references the Digital Shadow Reference Model for conformance."
]
